acceptance_targets: [ch17-craft-001] PASS if the revised passage spanning snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_17.md:269 through snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_17.md:357 contains (1) one specific concrete detail of the affair beyond timeline/accounting language, and (2) one immediate physical or behavioral consequence from Nora or June that changes the interaction flow before rule edits; FAIL if disclosure remains abstract and moves straight into policy updates.

[ch17-booker-001] PASS if, after the disclosure scene, at least one new explicit cost (refusal, withdrawal, denied request, or altered plan tied to the affair) persists through two or more subsequent interactions before conciliatory help appears; FAIL if reconciliation-adjacent gestures arrive without sustained cost on page.

[FBK-02-004] PASS if the revised scenes anchored at snapshots/cycle_02/FINAL_NOVEL.md:5690 and snapshots/cycle_02/FINAL_NOVEL.md:5816 allow a reader to identify speaker by rhythm/lexicon alone in at least three exchanges; FAIL if the conversation still reads as uniform legal-process dialogue.

findings.acceptance_test: PASS if the revised passage spanning snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_17.md:269 through snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_17.md:357 contains (1) one specific concrete detail of the affair beyond timeline/accounting language, and (2) one immediate physical or behavioral consequence from Nora or June that changes the interaction flow before rule edits; FAIL if disclosure remains abstract and moves straight into policy updates.
findings.evidence: Affair disclosure stays procedural/abstract at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_17.md:273 and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_17.md:299, then pivots to line-item governance at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_17.md:341 and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_17.md:357 with minimal embodied fallout.
findings.problem: Sanitization/timidity at the betrayal apex: the scene reports the affair as compliance facts and quickly converts pain into administrative edits, which mutes the embodied consequence the chapter has earned.
findings.rewrite_direction: Rework the disclosure-and-aftermath span at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_17.md:269, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_17.md:273, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_17.md:299, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_17.md:331, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_17.md:341 so the confession includes at least one concrete, non-euphemistic detail that makes the affair materially real to Nora/June, and add an immediate embodied reaction beat before the rules rewrite resumes.

findings.acceptance_test: PASS if, after the disclosure scene, at least one new explicit cost (refusal, withdrawal, denied request, or altered plan tied to the affair) persists through two or more subsequent interactions before conciliatory help appears; FAIL if reconciliation-adjacent gestures arrive without sustained cost on page.
findings.evidence: After rupture escalation at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_17.md:307 and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_17.md:315, later scenes pivot quickly to functional rhythm and a conciliatory gesture at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_17.md:521 before durable social cost is dramatized.
findings.problem: Consequence compression: the chapter lands the affair fracture but restores household operability too quickly, reducing long-tail narrative pressure from the reveal.
findings.rewrite_direction: Adjust the post-disclosure return-home sequence at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_17.md:489, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_17.md:521, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_17.md:553 so at least one concrete relational cost of the affair remains active across multiple beats before any softening gesture.

findings.acceptance_test: PASS if the revised scenes anchored at snapshots/cycle_02/FINAL_NOVEL.md:5690 and snapshots/cycle_02/FINAL_NOVEL.md:5816 allow a reader to identify speaker by rhythm/lexicon alone in at least three exchanges; FAIL if the conversation still reads as uniform legal-process dialogue.
findings.problem: Reentry chapter plays as a policy hearing for too long; Nora and June both speak in near-identical contractual syntax, muting scene volatility and idiolect separation.
findings.rewrite_direction: Retain legal terms but retexture dialogue at snapshots/cycle_02/FINAL_NOVEL.md:5690, snapshots/cycle_02/FINAL_NOVEL.md:5696, snapshots/cycle_02/FINAL_NOVEL.md:5716, snapshots/cycle_02/FINAL_NOVEL.md:5816, and snapshots/cycle_02/FINAL_NOVEL.md:5842 with more overlap, interruption, and character-specific wording (Nora clinical deadlines; June sharper campus irony; Eli fractured shame responses).

non_negotiables: Maintain heading contract exactly (# Chapter N).
Elliptical clipping is not permitted in dialogue or narration.
Avoid transcript cadence in high-stakes dialogue.
Avoid stiff over-formality in dialogue; use contractions and colloquial rhythm where character-true.
Reduce procedural drift when it displaces embodied consequence.
Maintain character-specific voice signatures from style bible.
Honor aesthetic risk policy: sanitization is the primary craft risk — do not soften, euphemize, or retreat from the story's established register. When in doubt, err toward rawness.

revision_pass.focus: Prioritize structural and craft blockers first: causality, chapter architecture, stakes clarity, continuity logic, and all HIGH/CRITICAL defects.
revision_pass.label: HIGH/CRITICAL structural/craft fixes

aesthetic_risk_policy.creative_risk_policy: Lean into morally mixed behavior, bodily consequence, and economic detail when they are causally active. In edge cases, choose the more concrete and uncomfortable rendering unless it violates factual continuity; if two renderings are equally plausible, prefer the one that increases character accountability rather than reader reassurance.
aesthetic_risk_policy.euphemism_penalty: If a scene contains pain, sex, addiction, debt panic, or humiliation, abstract phrasing is treated as a failed draft and must be rewritten with embodied specificity.

dialogue_rules.default_contraction_use: high - contractions are the spoken default; uncontracted forms are reserved for emphasis, legal precision, or deliberate emotional distance.

prose_style_profile.chapter_texture_variance: Alternate chapter architectures across the book: confrontation chapters, document-information turns, labor-process chapters, transit interiority chapters, and quiet relational chapters. Consecutive chapters must differ in scene density or dialogue-to-interiority ratio.
prose_style_profile.diction: Contemporary American literary realism: precise, unsentimental, image-aware, and concrete under stress.
prose_style_profile.narrative_distance: close third-person anchored to Eli, with no unmarked POV drift.
prose_style_profile.rhythm_target: Braided cadence: reflective medium-length sentences interrupted by blunt short lines at impact moments.
